title: Opportunity Solution Tree — tree + change-set
description: Single source of truth for the JSON shapes consumed by scripts/validate_ost.py. IMPORTANT — split of responsibilities: this schema enforces TOP-LEVEL SHAPE ONLY (required keys, types at the tree and change-set roots, per-action common-field shapes). The schema does NOT enumerate valid action verbs — Rule 5 (valid-action-vocabulary) is enforced at exit code 1 (rule violation) by validate_ost.py, not at exit 2 (schema violation). The schema also does NOT enforce per-node-type required fields (e.g., Opportunity requires evidence_basis; AssumptionTest requires threshold) — those live in code via _validate_node_types(...) inside validate_ost.py. Rationale: implementing draft-07 oneOf / if-then-else over the per-node-type shapes would roughly triple the stdlib-only schema-validator implementation; splitting concerns keeps the schema and the script each readable. A downstream consumer reusing this schema without the script gets top-level shape validation only — vocabulary and per-type checks are the script's job. See docs/specs/phase-2-discovery-primitives/spec.md §"Open questions".
